certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

gaps: No explicit AI risk assessment, impact analysis or continual monitoring process defined
Missing transparency, explainability and audit-trail requirements for automated scheduling decisions
Human oversight limited to escalation rules; no broader accountability or competence framework for AI operators
recommendations: Perform formal AI system impact assessment and maintain risk register per ISO/IEC 42001 Clause 6.1
Add decision-logging, version control of schedules and human-in-the-loop approval gates
Establish documented AI competence, training and performance-evaluation procedures for hybrid operations

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: high. Quality: 100%
